title: dianthera pohliana
intro: Dianthera pohliana, also known as the West Indian lilac or Puerto Rican lilac, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Dianthera pohliana include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
